executive_summary: Prioritize high-energy action and sci-fi (virtual/digital worlds, AI) plus revenge/post‑apocalyptic titles and prestige drama — matching recent franchise binges (Tron, Mission: Impossible, LOTR), survival narratives, and crime/thriller interest. On-server picks are available in the provided Plex candidates and skew 75% movies / 25% shows; off-server picks fill gaps for dystopian/post‑apoc, revenge, and auteur-driven sci‑fi.
